title: Admin Dashboard with Next.js
description: Build a fully-featured admin dashboard: authentication with role-based access, data tables, charts, file uploads, form validation, error monitoring, and production deployment.

steps.description: Initialize Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Tailwind CSS v4 for styling
Install shadcn/ui for data tables, charts, forms, and dialogs
Set up Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL for the admin data layer
Add Clerk auth with role-based access control (admin vs user roles)
Add Zod schema validation for admin forms and API inputs
Add Zustand for client-side state (filters, selections, sidebar state)
Add file upload support (avatars, attachments) with UploadThing
Add unit and integration tests for admin logic
Add error monitoring to catch production issues early
Deploy the admin dashboard to production
